lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਨਾਮਦੇਵ ਜੀ ਕੇ ਪਦੇ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree sree naamadev jee ke pade ghar 1 |
lines.english: Goojaree, Padhay Of Naam Dayv Jee, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੌ ਭੀਖ ਮੰਗਾਵਹਿ ਤ ਕਿਆ ਘਟਿ ਜਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jau bheekh mangaaveh ta kiaa ghatt jaaee |1|
lines.english: If You made me beg for charity, what would it take away from me? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਹਰਿ ਭਜੁ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਪਦੁ ਨਿਰਬਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: toon har bhaj man mere pad nirabaan |
lines.english: Meditate and vibrate upon the Lord, O my mind, and you shall obtain the state of Nirvaanaa.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੌ ਰਾਜੁ ਦੇਹਿ ਤ ਕਵਨ ਬਡਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jau raaj dehi ta kavan baddaaee |
lines.english: If You gave me an empire, then what glory would be in it for me?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਤੈ ਉਪਾਈ ਭਰਮ ਭੁਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh tai upaaee bharam bhulaaee |
lines.english: You created all, and You lead them astray in doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਤੂੰ ਦੇਵਹਿ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jis toon deveh tiseh bujhaaee |2|
lines.english: They alone understand, unto whom You give understanding. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਹੋਇ ਤੇਰਾ ਆਵਨ ਜਾਨੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bahur na hoe teraa aavan jaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You shall not have to come and go in reincarnation any longer. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤ ਸਹਸਾ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur milai ta sahasaa jaaee |
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, doubt is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਸੁ ਹਉ ਪੂਜਉ ਦੂਜਾ ਨਦਰਿ ਨ ਆਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kis hau poojau doojaa nadar na aaee |3|
lines.english: Who else should I worship? I can see no other. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੈ ਪਾਥਰ ਕੀਜੈ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ekai paathar keejai bhaau |
lines.english: One stone is lovingly decorated,

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਪਾਥਰ ਧਰੀਐ ਪਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: doojai paathar dhareeai paau |
lines.english: while another stone is walked upon.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਓਹੁ ਦੇਉ ਤ ਓਹੁ ਭੀ ਦੇਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: je ohu deo ta ohu bhee devaa |
lines.english: If one is a god, then the other must also be a god.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਨਾਮਦੇਉ ਹਮ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: keh naamadeo ham har kee sevaa |4|1|
lines.english: Says Naam Dayv, I serve the Lord. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲੈ ਨ ਲਾਛੈ ਪਾਰ ਮਲੋ ਪਰਮਲੀਓ ਬੈਠੋ ਰੀ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: malai na laachhai paar malo paramaleeo baittho ree aaee |
lines.english: He does not have even a trace of impurity - He is beyond impurity. He is fragrantly scented - He has come to take His Seat in my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree ghar 1 |
lines.english: Goojaree, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਤ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪੇਖਿਓ ਕਵਨੈ ਜਾਣੈ ਰੀ ਬਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aavat kinai na pekhio kavanai jaanai ree baaee |1|
lines.english: No one saw Him come - who can know Him, O Siblings of Destiny? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਣੁ ਕਹੈ ਕਿਣਿ ਬੂਝੀਐ ਰਮਈਆ ਆਕੁਲੁ ਰੀ ਬਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kaun kahai kin boojheeai rameea aakul ree baaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Who can describe Him? Who can understand Him? The all-pervading Lord has no ancestors, O Siblings of Destiny. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜਲ ਮਾਝੈ ਮਾਛਲੋ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਪੇਖਣੋ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jiau jal maajhai maachhalo maarag pekhano na jaaee |2|
lines.english: and the path of a fish through the water cannot be seen;||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਆਕਾਸੈ ਪੰਖੀਅਲੋ ਖੋਜੁ ਨਿਰਖਿਓ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jiau aakaasai pankheealo khoj nirakhio na jaaee |
lines.english: As the path of a bird's flight across the sky cannot be seen,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੇ ਚੇ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਬੀਠਲੋ ਜਿਨਿ ਤੀਨੈ ਜਰਿਆ ॥੩॥੨॥
lines.translit: naame che suaamee beetthalo jin teenai jariaa |3|2|
lines.english: - so is God, the Lord and Master of Naam Dayv, who fits these three comparisons. ||3||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਆਕਾਸੈ ਘੜੂਅਲੋ ਮ੍ਰਿਗ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਭਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jiau aakaasai gharrooalo mrig trisanaa bhariaa |
lines.english: As the mirage leads one to mistake the sky for a pitcher filled with water

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਜੀ ਕੇ ਪਦੇ ਘਰੁ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree sree ravidaas jee ke pade ghar 3 |
lines.english: Goojaree, Padhay Of Ravi Daas Jee, Third House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਧੁ ਤ ਬਛਰੈ ਥਨਹੁ ਬਿਟਾਰਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: doodh ta bachharai thanahu bittaario |
lines.english: The calf has contaminated the milk in the teats.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਈ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਪੂਜਾ ਕਹਾ ਲੈ ਚਰਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: maaee gobind poojaa kahaa lai charaavau |
lines.english: O mother, where shall I find any offering for the Lord's worship?

lines.gurmukhi: ਫੂਲੁ ਭਵਰਿ ਜਲੁ ਮੀਨਿ ਬਿਗਾਰਿਓ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: fool bhavar jal meen bigaario |1|
lines.english: The bumble bee has contaminated the flower, and the fish the water. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਫੂਲੁ ਅਨੂਪੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: avar na fool anoop na paavau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I cannot find any other flowers worthy of the incomparable Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਬਸਹਿ ਇਕ ਸੰਗਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bikh amrit baseh ik sangaa |2|
lines.english: Poison and nectar dwell there together. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈਲਾਗਰ ਬੇਰ੍ਹੇ ਹੈ ਭੁਇਅੰਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: mailaagar berhe hai bhueiangaa |
lines.english: The snakes encircle the sandalwood trees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੈਸੇ ਪੂਜ ਕਰਹਿ ਤੇਰੀ ਦਾਸਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kaise pooj kareh teree daasaa |3|
lines.english: how are Your slaves to worship You? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੂਪ ਦੀਪ ਨਈਬੇਦਹਿ ਬਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: dhoop deep neebedeh baasaa |
lines.english: Even with incense, lamps, offerings of food and fragrant flowers,

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਪਾਵਉ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad niranjan paavau |4|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I attain the immaculate Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਜਾ ਅਰਚਾ ਆਹਿ ਨ ਤੋਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: poojaa arachaa aaeh na toree |
lines.english: I cannot worship You, nor offer You flowers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਅਰਪਉ ਪੂਜ ਚਰਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: tan man arpau pooj charaavau |
lines.english: I dedicate and offer my body and mind to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਰਵਿਦਾਸ ਕਵਨ ਗਤਿ ਮੋਰੀ ॥੫॥੧॥
lines.translit: keh ravidaas kavan gat moree |5|1|
lines.english: Says Ravi Daas, what shall my condition be hereafter? ||5||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਤ੍ਰਿਲੋਚਨ ਜੀਉ ਕੇ ਪਦੇ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree sree trilochan jeeo ke pade ghar 1 |
lines.english: Goojaree, Padhay Of Trilochan Jee, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰੁ ਮਲਿ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਨਹੀ ਕੀਨਾ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਭੇਖ ਉਦਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: antar mal niramal nahee keenaa baahar bhekh udaasee |
lines.english: You have not cleansed the filth from within yourself, although outwardly, you wear the dress of a renunciate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਕਮਲੁ ਘਟਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਨ ਚੀਨੑਾ ਕਾਹੇ ਭਇਆ ਸੰਨਿਆਸੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hiradai kamal ghatt braham na cheenaa kaahe bheaa saniaasee |1|
lines.english: In the heart-lotus of your self, you have not recognized God - why have you become a Sannyaasee? ||1||
